videos.title: Human Advancement Is Being Negatively Affected by a "Very Difficult, Toxic Geopolitical Environment"
videos.description: H.E. Naledi Pandor, former Minister of International Relations and Cooperation for the nation of South Africa, warned that we are in a “very difficult, toxic geopolitical environment,” where the past advances in civilization and the rights of humanity are under threat. She warned of the danger of a serious reversal of the gains of women’s equality, and the threat of a renewed arms race. The idea that “might is right, and might is all that matters,” has become dangerously dominant in the U.S. In particular, she said, “it is tragic that we have allowed over 18 months of the slaughter of Palestine.” She endorsed the Schiller Institute’s Oasis Plan and other initiatives that are intended to create a “caring, rational global leadership,” initiatives that represent “an adult in the room.” She called for the BRICS to emerge as a group of world leaders who represent this outlook.

videos.title: There Is No Problem Human Creativity Can't Solve!
videos.description:
Helga Zepp-LaRouche's keynote address to Panel 1 of the Memorial Day Weekend Conference. 

Watch the entire conference here
https://schillerinstitute.com/blog/2025/03/01/conference-invitation/

"We are the creative species,—the only one known in the universe so far,—but the human mind as the microcosm of the universe at large, the macrocosm, is demonstrably of an anti-entropic nature. Our creative reason is capable of always finding a solution to any problem on a higher plane, and that is why I am certain, that by mobilizing the best potential of mankind in its entirety, that we will be able to reach a new paradigm in our international relations, that will catapult us into a new era in the history of mankind. We will be able to create a world community, which will be worthy of the dignity of man and the potential beauty of his soul. One has to say no to any “practical“ approach to politics, and start from that vision!" — Helga Zepp-LaRouche
